Title: Add job lifecycle timestamps and transition model
Description: Add on_my_way_at, started_at, and completed_at support with strict transition rules for dispatched jobs.
Acceptance Criteria: Transitions enforced server-side; Invalid transitions return 422; Timestamps set once and persist; Org-scoped access enforced

Title: Create technician quick-action endpoints for mobile status updates
Description: Expose protected endpoints for on-my-way, started, and completed updates with minimal payloads for one-tap UX.
Acceptance Criteria: Endpoints require auth; Endpoints update only org-owned jobs; Response includes updated lifecycle state; Audit event emitted

Title: Build job activity timeline model and API
Description: Persist actor/action timeline entries for dispatch and lifecycle changes and return timeline in job detail API.
Acceptance Criteria: Timeline stores actor/action/from/to/timestamp; Timeline ordered descending by time; Timeline is org-scoped; Covered by integration tests

Title: Add customer notification adapter and internal channel implementation
Description: Implement notification adapter interface with internal channel for lifecycle updates and pluggable SMS/email provider hooks.
Acceptance Criteria: Adapter interface implemented; Internal channel sends deterministic message payloads; Failures are captured without breaking state transition; Tests cover success/failure

Title: Wire lifecycle updates to customer notifications
Description: Trigger customer notification events on on-my-way, started, and completed job updates.
Acceptance Criteria: Each lifecycle event triggers exactly one notification event; Message includes customer name and time context; Duplicate sends prevented on idempotent retries

Title: Implement mobile-first technician job action card
Description: Add mobile-optimized job action UI for on-my-way, started, and completed actions with <=3 taps from job detail.
Acceptance Criteria: Actions visible on mobile viewport; Action latency feedback shown; Success state reflected in job detail and timeline; Accessibility labels present

Title: Add dispatch-to-completion end-to-end smoke coverage
Description: Add deterministic smoke/e2e tests that validate dispatch, lifecycle transitions, timeline entries, and notification trigger points.
Acceptance Criteria: Backend integration test passes; Frontend e2e mobile viewport passes; CI includes focused gate before full suite

Title: Add operational dashboard card for active lifecycle stages
Description: Add dashboard counters for on-my-way, in-progress, and completed-today to support owner/operator visibility.
Acceptance Criteria: Cards load org-scoped counts; Empty-state handling present; Values update after lifecycle changes; Mobile layout remains usable
